zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Thornborough于大约1440年出生在英国藍卡爾时，他的父亲Henry Thornburgh51岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Boothe47岁。他去世于1531年12月19日在英国英格兰藍卡爾哈普斯費爾德享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thornborough
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of various places, including Thornborough in Allerton Mauleverer (WR Yorks), Thornbrough in South Kilvington (NR Yorks), Thornbrough in Corbridge (Northumb), and Thornborough (Bucks).  See also  Thornbury   and   Thornber  .
2  Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’;  compare  Thornton  .

variants.name: Thornton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England and Scotland so called, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The placename is most frequent in northern England, especially Yorkshire, where there are at least 16 possible sources for the surname.
Irish: Anglicized (translated) form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin ‘son of Sceachán’ (see Skehan ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Draighneáin ‘descendant of Draighneán’ (see Drennan ).

variants.name: Thornbury
meanings: Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thornber
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the five minor places in Yorkshire called Thornber, particularly Thornber in Halton West. The placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + beorg ‘hill, mound’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thornberry
meanings: English (southwestern): habitational name from any of various places called Thornbury, in particular Thornbury (Gloucestershire), Thornbury (Herefordshire), or perhaps Thornbury (Devon), or Thornbury in Bradford (Yorkshire). These placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + burg ‘fortress’ or ‘manor’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thornburgh
meanings: English (Worcestershire) and Irish: variant of   Thornbury  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Thornborough was born about 1440, in Lancashire, England, his father, Henry Thornburgh, was 51 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Boothe, was 47. He died on 19 December 1531, in Hampsfield, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Thornborough est né environ 1440, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Thornburgh, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Boothe, avait 47 ans. Il est décédé le 19 décembre 1531, à Hampsfield, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Thornborough um 1440 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Thornburgh 51 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Boothe 47. Er starb am 19. Dezember 1531 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Hampsfield, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Thornborough è nato il circa 1440 nel Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Henry Thornburgh, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Boothe, aveva 47 anni. Morì il 19 dicembre 1531, nel Hampsfield, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 92 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Thornborough(이)가 대략 1440년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Thornburgh(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Boothe(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1531년 12월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 함프스필드에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Thornborough родился около 1440 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Thornburgh было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Boothe, 47. Он умер 19 декабря 1531 г. в местности хампсфиелд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 92 лет.
